calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Continued To Mar-30-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the moving papers provide sufficient support for the court's approval of the settlement. The prevailing is to provide a form of order and a separate judgment.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Continued To Jan-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
